projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 – major HV transmission and substation works planned.
projects.summary: Development of new 500kV and 330kV transmission lines and substations to connect the Hunter-Central Coast REZ. Involves significant HV equipment, including transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Environmental Impact Statement (EIS) lodged, awaiting approval; major procurement for HV components expected post-approval. energyco.nsw.gov.au (2025)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and remaining specialist HV equipment FAT.
projects.summary: Development of major 330kV and 500kV transmission lines, substations, and new grid connection points to unlock the Central-West Orana REZ. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Major construction commenced early 2024 with EPC Acciona and GE Vernova. energyco.nsw.gov.au (2025)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 – early engagement for future HV transmission and substation works.
projects.summary: Planned new transmission infrastructure, including 330kV lines and substations, to connect renewable projects in the New England region. Involves HV equipment for grid integration.
projects.statusNote: Project scoping and consultation ongoing. Initial studies underway for the transmission infrastructure. energyco.nsw.gov.au (2025)

projects.location: North West Tasmania to Gippsland, VIC
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now – pre-tender for major HVDC converter stations and subsea cable.
projects.summary: A 1500 MW HVDC interconnector between Tasmania and Victoria, including two HVDC converter stations and submarine/underground cables. Involves significant HVDC equipment, transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Project nearing Final Investment Decision (FID) in late 2024/early 2025, with early procurement expected shortly after. marinuslink.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and final equipment checks.
projects.summary: One of the largest onshore wind farms in Australia (1,026 MW), including 180 turbines and associated electrical infrastructure, collector substations, and a new 330kV transmission line connection. Involves HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2022, expected to be fully operational by H1 2025. acciona.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q3 2025 – position for HV substation and grid connection component FAT/QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed hyperscale data centre facility with significant power requirements, necessitating new or upgraded high-voltage substation infrastructure and grid connection.
projects.statusNote: Stage 1 development application approved for early works. Main construction procurement expected to commence mid-2025. planningportal.nsw.gov.au (2025)

projects.projectName: Western Downs Green Power Hub - BESS
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – BESS commissioning inspection and ongoing QAQC.
projects.summary: Integrated project comprising a 460MW solar farm (operational) and a 200MW/400MWh battery energy storage system (under construction). Involves large-scale BESS and associated HV connection equipment.
projects.statusNote: Solar farm operational; BESS under construction by Fluence, expected completion Q4 2025. neoen.com (2024)

projects.location: Wagga Wagga, NSW to Robertstown, SA
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now – ongoing QAQC, inspection, and commissioning support for remaining HV substation components.
projects.summary: A new 330kV interconnector between Wagga Wagga (NSW) and Robertstown (SA), including new substations and over 900km of transmission lines. Involves extensive HV transformers, switchgear, and GIS.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2022, expected completion 2026. Substation works ongoing. transgrid.com.au (2025)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – final QAQC and commissioning support for remaining electrical systems.
projects.summary: A 250MW / 2,000MWh pumped hydro energy storage project, converting an old gold mine. Involves significant electrical infrastructure, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2021, expected completion H1 2025. genexpower.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing electrical infrastructure installation.
projects.summary: Hyperscale data centre facility with planned expansions, requiring significant electrical infrastructure upgrades including new substations and high-voltage grid connections.
projects.statusNote: M3 Melbourne development and expansion ongoing, aiming for staged completion through 2025-2026. nextdc.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Star of the South Offshore Wind Farm
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2027 – early discussions for future offshore HV cable and substation component QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed ~2.2GW offshore wind farm off the coast of Gippsland, Victoria, including offshore and onshore substations and transmission lines. Involves huge scale HVDC converter stations, transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Environmental assessments and consultation ongoing; project targeting FID in late 2020s. starofthesouth.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 – early positioning for HV transmission and substation component QAQC.
projects.summary: Development of new 275kV transmission lines and substations to connect the proposed Borumba Pumped Hydro energy storage project to the grid. Involves significant HV equipment.
projects.statusNote: Early planning and community consultation underway for the transmission connection project. cleanenergyhubs.powerlink.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – ongoing QAQC and inspection for HV transmission lines and substation equipment.
projects.summary: A 1,000km new 500kV and 330kV transmission line connecting Mount Isa to the National Electricity Market and unlocking vast renewable energy and critical minerals projects. Involves extensive HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction officially commenced November 2023, expected completion 2029. Major procurement ongoing. copperstring2032.com.au (2025)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – ongoing QAQC and inspection for HV transmission lines and substation equipment.
projects.summary: A new 500kV transmission line and associated substation upgrades to reinforce the backbone of the grid in southern NSW, connecting new renewable energy to customers. Involves significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Major construction contracts awarded Q4 2023 / Q1 2024, with early works underway. transgrid.com.au (2025)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for solar and BESS electrical components.
projects.summary: A 275MW solar farm co-located with a 200MWh BESS. Includes new substation and grid connection infrastructure. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and battery energy storage systems.
projects.statusNote: Financial close and construction commencement announced March 2024. x-elio.com (2024), reneweconomy.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2027 – early discussions for massive HVDC submarine cable and converter station components.
projects.summary: Proposed 20GW solar farm and 42GWh BESS in NT, connected to Darwin and Singapore via a ~4,200km HVDC submarine cable. Involves huge scale HVDC converter stations, transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Project acquired by new owners mid-2023 after administration, current status is re-evaluation and detailed planning for revised project timeline. suncable.sg (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – position for turbine component QAQC and substation equipment FAT.
projects.summary: Proposed second stage of the Moorabool Wind Farm (approx. 100MW), including additional wind turbines and associated balance of plant and electrical infrastructure, including new substation components.
projects.statusNote: Planning approval granted for Stage 2, project awaiting FID and commencement of procurement. goldwind.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 – early engagement for electrolyser FAT and HV electrical infrastructure QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed large-scale green hydrogen production facility powered by dedicated renewable energy (solar/wind), involving electrolysers, power conversion, and associated HV electrical infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Project in feasibility and early planning stages; FID not yet announced. ffi.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – positioning for major HV substation and BESS component FAT and QAQC.
projects.summary: A large-scale integrated renewable energy project including ~1.2GW solar farm, 400MW BESS (800MWh), and 300km of 330kV transmission line. Involves extensive HV transformers, switchgear, and battery systems.
projects.statusNote: Project has received all major approvals, awaiting FID. Environmental approvals granted 2023-2024. bulli.ere.energy (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing BESS component delivery and installation.
projects.summary: A 460MW / 920MWh battery energy storage system located at the Eraring Power Station site, connected to the existing transmission network. Involves large-scale BESS, HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Final Investment Decision announced and EPC contract awarded to Doosan in April 2024, with construction underway. originenergy.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for new substation and power infrastructure components.
projects.summary: New multi-storey data centre facility in Artarmon, Sydney, requiring significant high-voltage power infrastructure and new substation components for grid connection.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2023, with phased completion targeting 2025. dcidatacentres.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and final equipment QAQC for the BESS.
projects.summary: A 100MW / 200MWh grid-scale battery energy storage system co-located with the existing Kwinana Power Station. Involves large-scale BESS and associated HV infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced early 2023 by Synergy and expected to be operational by late 2024 / early 2025. arena.gov.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2027 – early engagement for large-scale electrolyser and associated HV electrical system QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed green hydrogen production and export facility, including ~3GW of integrated solar and wind generation, 2GW of electrolyser capacity, and associated HV power infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Feasibility studies and development approvals underway, targeting FID mid-2020s. arkenergy.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing BESS component delivery and installation.
projects.summary: A 219MW / 877MWh battery energy storage system near Collie, Western Australia, connected to the South West Interconnected System. Involves large-scale BESS, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Financial close announced and construction commenced March 2024. neoen.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and final equipment QAQC for the BESS.
projects.summary: A 110MW battery energy storage system adjacent to APA's existing Darling Downs Power Station. Involves large-scale BESS and associated HV infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2023, targeting completion 2024/early 2025. apa.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 – early positioning for future HV transmission infrastructure component QAQC.
projects.summary: Development of new high-voltage transmission lines and substations to connect future offshore wind farms to the Victorian grid. Involves significant HV equipment for large-scale grid integration.
projects.statusNote: Strategic planning and consultation for offshore wind energy zones and transmission infrastructure is ongoing. energy.vic.gov.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing BESS component delivery and installation.
projects.summary: A 100MW / 200MWh battery energy storage system near Cairns, connected to the existing Queensland transmission network. Involves large-scale BESS, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Financial close announced and EPC contract awarded to UGL in February 2024, with construction underway. cleancoqld.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and final QAQC for electrical infrastructure.
projects.summary: A 244MW wind farm in New South Wales, including wind turbines, internal electrical reticulation, and a substation for grid connection. Involves HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2022, expected to be fully operational in 2025. squadronenergy.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing solar and BESS component delivery.
projects.summary: Integrated project with an operational 450MW wind farm, and ongoing construction of 400MW solar farm and 200MW/400MWh BESS. Includes new substation and grid connection. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and battery energy storage systems.
projects.statusNote: Wind farm operational; solar and battery components under construction, targeting completion 2025. res-group.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – position for BESS component FAT and associated HV electrical equipment QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed battery energy storage system expansion co-located with the operational Limondale Solar Farm. Will involve large-scale BESS and associated HV connection infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: BESS expansion currently in planning and development stages. rwe.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Goyder South Renewable Energy Project - Stage 2 (Solar & BESS)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – position for major wind, solar, and BESS component FAT/QAQC for Stage 2.
projects.summary: Multi-stage renewable energy project including wind, solar, and battery storage. Stage 1 (412MW wind) is under construction. Stage 2 includes additional wind, solar (300MW), and BESS (300MW/600MWh). Involves extensive HV infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Stage 1 wind farm under construction. Stage 2 (wind, solar, BESS) in advanced development with FID expected late 2024/early 2025. neoen.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – final QAQC and commissioning support for transmission line and substation components.
projects.summary: New 132kV transmission line and associated substation infrastructure to connect the Kaban Green Power Hub to the grid. Involves HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2022, expected completion 2024. powerlink.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing BESS component delivery and installation.
projects.summary: A 150MW / 300MWh battery energy storage system near Gladstone, Queensland, connected to the existing transmission network. Involves large-scale BESS, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Financial close announced November 2023, construction commenced 2024. engie.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing electrical infrastructure installation.
projects.summary: Hyperscale data centre facility in Horsley Park, Western Sydney, requiring significant high-voltage power infrastructure and new substation components for grid connection.
projects.statusNote: S5 Sydney development and expansion ongoing, aiming for staged completion through 2025-2026. nextdc.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Kurri Kurri Gas Power Station with BESS
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for BESS components and substation upgrades.
projects.summary: A 660MW gas-fired power station with an integrated 500MW BESS (1000MWh) co-located. Involves significant HV transformers, switchgear, and battery energy storage systems for grid connection.
projects.statusNote: Gas plant under construction since 2022, BESS announced and under procurement from H2 2024. snowyhydro.com.au (2025)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – early positioning for future wind turbine and electrical infrastructure QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed 300MW wind farm in Queensland, including up to 50 wind turbines, substations, and a new 275kV transmission line connection. Involves HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Environmental Impact Statement (EIS) submitted and under assessment. FID not yet announced. planning.dsdmip.qld.gov.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now – position for BESS component FAT and associated HV electrical equipment QAQC.
projects.summary: A 150MW / 300MWh battery energy storage system at the former Hazelwood power station site, connected to the existing transmission network. Involves large-scale BESS, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Project in advanced development, targeting FID by late 2024. engie.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – early positioning for major wind turbine, solar, BESS, and HV substation component QAQC.
projects.summary: Large-scale hybrid renewable project including up to 1.5GW wind, 400MW solar, and 400MW BESS. Requires extensive new HV transmission lines and substations for grid connection. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and battery energy storage systems.
projects.statusNote: Planning approval granted February 2024. Project in pre-FID stage. planningportal.nsw.gov.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and final QAQC for electrical infrastructure.
projects.summary: A waste-to-energy facility generating ~29MW of electricity, including new electrical infrastructure and grid connection. Involves HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2022, targeting commercial operations in H2 2025. acciona.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2027 – early discussions for electrolyser and associated HV electrical infrastructure QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed green hydrogen production and export facility at Port of Newcastle, including electrolysers, renewable energy integration, and associated HV electrical infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Project in feasibility study phase; FID expected mid to late 2020s. originenergy.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now – position for major BESS component FAT and associated HV electrical equipment QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed large-scale battery energy storage system (up to 500MW / 1000MWh) near Canberra, connected to the existing transmission network. Involves large-scale BESS, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Project in advanced development, FID expected late 2024. neoen.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 – early positioning for future wind, solar, BESS, and HV substation component QAQC.
projects.summary: Integrated renewable energy project (up to 1.4GW wind, 1.2GW solar, 600MW BESS) within the New England REZ, requiring extensive new HV transmission infrastructure and substations. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and battery energy storage systems.
projects.statusNote: Environmental Impact Statement (EIS) in progress, development approvals pending. walchaenergy.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing BESS component delivery and installation.
projects.summary: A 110MW / 220MWh battery energy storage system near Port Augusta, South Australia, connected to the existing transmission network. Involves large-scale BESS, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Financial close announced December 2023, construction commenced 2024. neoen.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 – early positioning for major solar, BESS, and HV substation component QAQC.
projects.summary: Proposed large-scale solar farm (up to 1.2GW) and battery energy storage system (up to 500MW/1000MWh), requiring new substation and grid connection infrastructure. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and battery energy storage systems.
projects.statusNote: Environmental Impact Statement (EIS) lodged and under assessment. acciona.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – position for wind turbine component QAQC and substation equipment FAT.
projects.summary: Proposed 440MW wind farm in New South Wales, including up to 64 wind turbines and associated electrical infrastructure, substation, and grid connection. Involves HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Development approval granted December 2023. Project currently in pre-FID stages. acciona.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and final equipment QAQC for HV electrical systems.
projects.summary: 1.6GW natural gas-fired power plant at Port of Açu, including significant HV substation and transmission infrastructure for grid connection. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Under construction, expected commercial operation in 2025. gna.com.br (2024)

projects.projectName: Ventos de São Raimundo Wind Complex
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing turbine and electrical infrastructure delivery.
projects.summary: Large-scale wind complex (approx. 500MW) in Piauí, including wind turbines, internal electrical network, and a new substation for grid connection. Involves HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2024. casadosventos.com.br (2024)

projects.projectName: ANEEL Auction 01/2023 - Lot 10 (Pernambuco/Rio Grande do Norte)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 – early positioning for major HV transmission line and substation equipment FAT/QAQC.
projects.summary: Development of new 500kV transmission lines (300km) and associated substations in Pernambuco and Rio Grande do Norte, awarded in ANEEL Auction No. 01/2023. Involves significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.

projects.projectName: Serra da Alegria Solar Farm BESS

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – ongoing QAQC and inspection for HV transmission line components.
projects.summary: A 161 km 500kV transmission line and associated substation expansions to strengthen the grid in Tocantins and Goiás. Involves HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction advancing rapidly, completion expected 2025. neoenergia.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – commissioning inspection and final equipment QAQC for HV electrical systems.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing turbine and electrical infrastructure delivery.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now – ongoing QAQC and inspection for major HV transmission line and substation equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate – QAQC and inspection for ongoing turbine, solar, and electrical infrastructure delivery.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 – early positioning for large-scale electrolyser and HV electrical infrastructure QAQC.
